description: Freelancer marketplace gig acceptance pipeline with three-guard validation: BOLA ownership check, SETNX exclusive lock, OCC bid freshness. T613 GigAcceptanceLockGateway enforces BOLA at ORDER 1, SETNX at ORDER 2, OCC at ORDER 3. T614 MilestoneContractManager: CONTRACT_IMMUTABLE_FIELDS at ORDER 1, sum validation at ORDER 2. T615 DeliveryGateEscrowController: delivery gate before release, LIFO [REFUND_MILESTONE, RESTORE_GIG_STATUS] compensation. T616 FreelancerReviewWriter: direction guard, duplicate check, append-only with comment excluded from audit.

n1.label: ValidateAcceptanceRequest
n1.description: Validate gig acceptance request: gigId, bidId, freelancerId present; tenantId from ALS for BOLA check

n2.label: RetrieveAcceptancePatterns
n2.description: RAG retrieval of BOLA + SETNX + OCC acceptance patterns: PROPOSAL-ACCEPTANCE-LOCK-001, CART-LOCK-SETNX-001 from FLOW-16

n3.label: DecomposeAcceptancePlan
n3.description: Decompose acceptance into ordered steps: BOLA check → SETNX lock → OCC bid check → audit → emit

n4.label: GenerateAcceptanceGateway
n4.description: AI generates T613 GigAcceptanceLockGateway with correct order: BOLA (gigPosting.clientTenantId === ALS.tenantId) at ORDER 1, SETNX(gig-accept-lock:{gigId}) at ORDER 2, OCC bid status check (bid.status === OPEN) at ORDER 3, storeDocument(audit) at ORDER 4, enqueue(GigAccepted) at ORDER 5. GigAcceptanceFailed on any guard failure. CF-17-1: extends CART-LOCK-SETNX-001.

n5.label: ValidateAcceptanceGateway
n5.description: Validate BOLA at ORDER 1, SETNX at ORDER 2, OCC at ORDER 3, storeDocument(audit) before GigAccepted, GigAcceptanceFailed on all failure paths

n6.label: ScoreAcceptanceGateway
n6.description: Score implementation: BOLA order compliance, SETNX exclusivity, OCC freshness check, DNA-8 audit before emit, failure event coverage

n8.label: StoreFeedback
n8.description: DPO triple: chosen=BOLA-ORDER1+SETNX-gig-lock+OCC-bid-status+CONTRACT_IMMUTABLE_FIELDS-compile-time+sum-validation+delivery-gate-before-release+LIFO-milestone-granularity+single-direction-review+comment-excluded-audit, rejected=no-BOLA OR SETNX-after-OCC OR mutable-contract-fields OR release-before-delivery OR FIFO-compensation OR duplicate-direction OR comment-in-platform-audit.
n8.discriminatingConstraint: Missing BOLA at ORDER 1 OR SETNX after OCC OR mutable CONTRACT_IMMUTABLE_FIELDS OR release without delivery validation OR FIFO compensation chain OR duplicate direction review allowed OR comment in platform audit receives score=0 and triggers n3 re-iteration. CF-17-1 (BOLA+SETNX+OCC), CF-17-2 (immutable+sum), CF-17-3 (delivery gate+LIFO), CF-17-4 (direction+append-only+comment-excluded).
